title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from pure coding skills to understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance, using AI agents as force multipliers. The video emphasizes that coding alone is no longer a differentiator and that the best juniors understand the "what" and "why" behind infrastructure decisions while leveraging AI tools.
